### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1

```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/scheduler.py",
  "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport signal\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List\r\n\r\nimport yaml\r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, update_queue_depth\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState, ScheduleTick\r\nfrom .state_machine import transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"scheduler\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class RecurringSchedule:\r\n     id: str\r\n     job_type: str\r\n     queue: str\r\n     interval_seconds: int\r\n     max_attempts: int\r\n     payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n def load_schedules(path: Path) -> List[RecurringSchedule]:\r\n     if not path.exists():\r\n         return []\r\n     raw = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")) or {}\r\n     out: List[RecurringSchedule] = []\r\n     for item in raw.get(\"schedules\", []):\r\n         out.append(\r\n             RecurringSchedule(\r\n                 id=str(item[\"id\"]),\r\n                 job_type=str(item[\"job_type\"]),\r\n                 queue=str(item.get(\"queue\", \"default\")),\r\n                 interval_seconds=int(item.get(\"interval_seconds\", 60)),\r\n                 max_attempts=int(item.get(\"max_attempts\", 3)),\r\n                 payload=dict(item.get(\"payload\", {})),\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n     return out\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_due_jobs(session: AsyncSession, now: datetime) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue delayed/retry jobs whose next_run_at is due.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     stmt = (\r\n         select(Job)\r\n         .where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\r\n                 Job.is_enqueued.is_(False),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at.is_not(None),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at <= now,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         .with_for_update(skip_locked=True)\r\n     )\r\n     result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n     jobs: List[Job] = list(result.scalars())\r\n     for job in jobs:\r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         job.next_run_at = None\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued delayed job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=\"delayed\").inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_recurring(\r\n     session: AsyncSession,\r\n     schedules: List[RecurringSchedule],\r\n     now: datetime,\r\n ) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue recurring jobs based on config file schedules.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     for sched in schedules:\r\n         # Compute the current tick's planned_time by flooring now to interval.\r\n         seconds = int(now.timestamp())\r\n         tick_start = seconds - (seconds % sched.interval_seconds)\r\n         planned = datetime.fromtimestamp(tick_start, tz=timezone.utc)\r\n \r\n         # Check if this tick already exists.\r\n         stmt = select(ScheduleTick).where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 ScheduleTick.schedule_id == sched.id,\r\n                 ScheduleTick.planned_time == planned,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         exists = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n         if exists:\r\n             continue\r\n \r\n         tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=sched.id, planned_time=planned)\r\n         session.add(tick)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         # Create a new job row for this schedule.\r\n         job = Job(\r\n             type=sched.job_type,\r\n             queue=sched.queue,\r\n             payload=sched.payload,\r\n             max_attempts=sched.max_attempts,\r\n             state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n             is_enqueued=False,\r\n             next_run_at=now,\r\n             schedule=sched.id,\r\n             idempotency_key=f\"{sched.id}:{planned.isoformat()}\",\r\n         )\r\n         session.add(job)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued recurring job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=sched.id).inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def scheduler_loop(schedules: List[RecurringSchedule]) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n \r\n     while True:\r\n         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n         async with factory() as session:\r\n             async with session.begin():\r\n                 await _enqueue_due_jobs(session, now)\r\n                 await _enqueue_recurring(session, schedules, now)\r\n         try:\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Failed to update queue depth\")\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.scheduler_interval_sec)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"scheduler\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Prometheus metrics server for scheduler.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n \r\n     config_path = Path(\"config\") / \"schedules.yml\"\r\n     schedules = load_schedules(config_path)\r\n     logger.info(\"Loaded schedules\", extra={\"count\": len(schedules)})\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     task = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_loop(schedules))\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     task.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:11:31 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/scheduler.py", "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport signal\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List\r\n\r\nimport yaml\r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, update_queue_depth\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState, ScheduleTick\r\nfrom .state_machine import transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"scheduler\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class RecurringSchedule:\r\n     id: str\r\n     job_type: str\r\n     queue: str\r\n     interval_seconds: int\r\n     max_attempts: int\r\n     payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n def load_schedules(path: Path) -> List[RecurringSchedule]:\r\n     if not path.exists():\r\n         return []\r\n     raw = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")) or {}\r\n     out: List[RecurringSchedule] = []\r\n     for item in raw.get(\"schedules\", []):\r\n         out.append(\r\n             RecurringSchedule(\r\n                 id=str(item[\"id\"]),\r\n                 job_type=str(item[\"job_type\"]),\r\n                 queue=str(item.get(\"queue\", \"default\")),\r\n                 interval_seconds=int(item.get(\"interval_seconds\", 60)),\r\n                 max_attempts=int(item.get(\"max_attempts\", 3)),\r\n                 payload=dict(item.get(\"payload\", {})),\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n     return out\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_due_jobs(session: AsyncSession, now: datetime) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue delayed/retry jobs whose next_run_at is due.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     stmt = (\r\n         select(Job)\r\n         .where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\r\n                 Job.is_enqueued.is_(False),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at.is_not(None),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at <= now,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         .with_for_update(skip_locked=True)\r\n     )\r\n     result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n     jobs: List[Job] = list(result.scalars())\r\n     for job in jobs:\r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         job.next_run_at = None\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued delayed job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=\"delayed\").inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_recurring(\r\n     session: AsyncSession,\r\n     schedules: List[RecurringSchedule],\r\n     now: datetime,\r\n ) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue recurring jobs based on config file schedules.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     for sched in schedules:\r\n         # Compute the current tick's planned_time by flooring now to interval.\r\n         seconds = int(now.timestamp())\r\n         tick_start = seconds - (seconds % sched.interval_seconds)\r\n         planned = datetime.fromtimestamp(tick_start, tz=timezone.utc)\r\n \r\n         # Check if this tick already exists.\r\n         stmt = select(ScheduleTick).where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 ScheduleTick.schedule_id == sched.id,\r\n                 ScheduleTick.planned_time == planned,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         exists = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n         if exists:\r\n             continue\r\n \r\n         tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=sched.id, planned_time=planned)\r\n         session.add(tick)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         # Create a new job row for this schedule.\r\n         job = Job(\r\n             type=sched.job_type,\r\n             queue=sched.queue,\r\n             payload=sched.payload,\r\n             max_attempts=sched.max_attempts,\r\n             state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n             is_enqueued=False,\r\n             next_run_at=now,\r\n             schedule=sched.id,\r\n             idempotency_key=f\"{sched.id}:{planned.isoformat()}\",\r\n         )\r\n         session.add(job)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued recurring job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=sched.id).inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def scheduler_loop(schedules: List[RecurringSchedule]) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n \r\n     while True:\r\n         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n         async with factory() as session:\r\n             async with session.begin():\r\n                 await _enqueue_due_jobs(session, now)\r\n                 await _enqueue_recurring(session, schedules, now)\r\n         try:\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Failed to update queue depth\")\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.scheduler_interval_sec)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"scheduler\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Prometheus metrics server for scheduler.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n \r\n     config_path = Path(\"config\") / \"schedules.yml\"\r\n     schedules = load_schedules(config_path)\r\n     logger.info(\"Loaded schedules\", extra={\"count\": len(schedules)})\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     task = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_loop(schedules))\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     task.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
